name: stellar-kyc
description: Stellar KYC — Reusable Identity Infrastructure for the Stellar Ecosystem

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run build --workspace=sdk
scripts.clean: rm -rf backend/dist frontend/dist sdk/dist node_modules backend/node_modules frontend/node_modules sdk/node_modules

author: Stellar KYC Contributors
